message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Customer
rectangle Frontend
rectangle Backend
database Database

rectangle "Make Event" {
  Customer -> Frontend: Presses the "Make new Event"-button
  Frontend -> Backend: Request to open new window
  Backend -> Backend: Generates empty event-object
  Backend --> Frontend: Opens new window
  Customer -> Frontend: Enters event information
  Customer -> Frontend: Presses "Create"-button
  Frontend -> Backend: Request to validate input

  alt [Successful case]
    Backend -> Backend: Validation successful
    Backend -> Database: Adds event to database
    Database --> Backend: Adds event to list
    Backend -> Frontend: Closes window
    Frontend -> Frontend: Selects newly added event from list
    Frontend --> Customer: Displays eventinformation to user
  else [Validation failed]
    Backend -> Backend: Validation failed
    Backend -> Frontend: Displays alert of type ERROR
    Frontend --> Customer: Lists up fields with errors
    Frontend -> Frontend: Closes alertbox
  end
}

rectangle "Cancel" {
  Customer -> Frontend: Presses the "Cancel"-button
  Frontend -> Backend: Request to close process
  Backend -> Backend: Deletes event-object
  Backend --> Frontend: Closes window
  Frontend -> Frontend: Selects first event in list
  Frontend --> Customer: Displays list of events
}

@enduml
